pkgmetadata.longdescription:
FastFlowLM (FLM) is a lightweight LLM inference runtime purpose-built for AMD Ryzen AI NPUs (XDNA2 architecture). It provides an Ollama-style CLI and OpenAI-compatible server API for running language models entirely on the NPU with no GPU or CPU compute required.
Supported hardware: Ryzen AI 300-series (Strix Point, Strix Halo), 400-series (Gorgon Point), and Z2 Extreme. XDNA1 (Ryzen AI 7000/8000) is NOT supported.
The orchestration code and CLI are MIT-licensed. NPU compute kernels (xclbins) are proprietary binaries, free for commercial use under $10M annual company revenue.
